ranked_scenarios.summary: Create new test(s) for expand on hover feature of the sidebar

description.text:
Given the expand on hover feature is still behind a pref (`sidebar.expandOnHover`), we decided to land changes without creating new tests. We should revisit this later and add tests before the feature is available by default.

At the very least, we should ensure that the feature is shown in the customize panel only when the vertical tabs feature is enabled and the "Hide sidebar" option is not enabled. We may also want to check the `position` property changing on the sidebar from `relative` to `absolute` when enabling expand on hover.
